_doc: CPU-only wind-skill regime diagnostic. Uses ONLY existing corpus CPU-WRF wrfout history (case2 0509 L2 72h + L3 24h). No GPU, no forecast. (1) persistence RMSE growth, (2) CPU-WRF L2-vs-L3 cross-RMSE = WRF self-spread = irreducible-uncertainty lower bound, (3) field temporal-motion vs spatial-std.
